title: NoHassleQuickConnect
description: A simple mod that lets you instantly switch Minecraft servers using /connect [ip]. Features tab completion for your saved servers and lets you switch servers without touching your mouse or navigating menus, making server hopping quick and accessible.
body:
# What does NoHassleQuickConnect (aka. NHQC) do:

Adds a /connect command that lets you quickly connect to Minecraft servers
Includes tab completion for servers from your server list
Provides instant server switching without going through menus

## 1.  Keyboard-only navigation:

> Switch servers without touching your mouse

> Perfect for players who prefer keyboard controls or have limited mouse mobility

> Great for accessibility when mouse usage is difficult or uncomfortable

## 2. Time-saving:
> No need to:
> Exit to main menu,
> Click multiplayer,
> Scroll through server list,
> Click connect.

> Just type /connect + server address and you're there
##  3. Server list integration:
> Press TAB after /connect to see all your saved servers

> Start typing a server name/address and use TAB to auto-complete

> No need to remember exact server addresses
## 4.  Basicly Instant switching:
> Switch between servers quickly without menu transitions

> Useful for server hopping, when playing on multiple servers, aswell as pvp scenarios
